allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add quiz feedback enhancements, skybox system, audio SFX, Three.js MCP, and project infrastructure

- Add correct/wrong sound effects \(from Buzz-chain\) and audio bootstrapping in useAudioSync
- Add quiz answer animations \(shake on wrong, bounce on correct\) in global CSS
- Add 3D ScorePopup for quiz results via lastQuizResult bridge in useGameStore
- Wire up audioManager.play\(''correct''/''wrong''\) in QuizModal
- Add Skybox component with per-game equirectangular panorama support and error boundary fallback
- Add basketball skybox image
- Add Three.js MCP server configuration \(.mcp.json\)
- Add game registry, game session hooks, keyboard controls, reduced motion support
- Add HomeButton, TutorialOverlay, and PauseMenu UI components
- Add unit tests and vitest configuration
- Update all game overlays to signal quiz results to 3D scene

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
